metadata.note: Informational baseline from macOS. Authoritative baseline requires Windows CI run covering net10.0 + net8.0 + net48 across all three test projects. This file will be overwritten by the first Windows CI pipeline run after merge. Downstream tasks should treat line numbers and coverage percentages as approximate until the authoritative baseline lands.

suspectBranches.notes: ResolveCore("en") always returns a non-null HeadingTable because the English locale is always registered by the source generator. The ?? Invariant fallback and the invariantCache lazy initializer are defensive code that cannot be reached via any public API call.

The ArgumentOutOfRangeException catch block handles the case where GregorianCalendar(GregorianCalendarTypes.Localized) is rejected. Every CultureInfo in .NET accepts at least one GregorianCalendar variant.
Defensive null checks against Roslyn API contracts. GetSyntaxRootAsync and GetSemanticModelAsync never return null for a document that triggered a diagnostic.
